data.title: Funko extends credit agreement to Dec 31, 2027 from Sept 17, 2026; tweaks financial covenants and pricing terms.
data.description: A pop culture lifestyle brand, Funko, Inc. (Nasdaq: FNKO), based in Everett, Wash., has reported a successful amendment and extension of its current credit agreement dated September 17, 2021. The amendment prolongs the maturity date of the loans under the credit agreement from September 17, 2026, to December 31, 2027. It also includes modifications and waivers of specific financial covenants, along with revised pricing terms. Funko's Chief Executive Officer expressed satisfaction with the changes.

data.title: BARK, Inc. updates acquisition process; Special Committee reviewing proposals to maximize value for stockholders.
data.description: In New York, BARK, Inc. (NYSE: BARK) disclosed that the Special Committee of the Board of Directors has issued specific instructions for potential bidders looking to acquire the company. The Committee, made up of impartial directors, aims to optimize value for all BARK stockholders. Their main objective is to evaluate all bids thoroughly for potential acquisition of the leading global omnichannel dog brand that aspires to bring joy to all dogs.

data.title: Extra Space Storage Inc. declares $1.62 per share dividend for 1st quarter 2026, payable March 31.
data.description: Salt Lake City, today, Extra Space Storage Inc. (NYSE: EXR) revealed that its board of directors approved a $1.62 per share dividend for the first quarter of 2026 on the Company's common stock. This dividend is scheduled to be paid on March 31, 2026.

data.title: SVEC announces 2026 Silicon Valley Engineering Hall of Fame inductees Andrea J. Goldsmith, PhD and R. Fabian Pease, PhD.
data.description: Two distinguished individuals, Andrea J. Goldsmith, PhD and R. Fabian Pease, PhD, will be honored at a ceremony and banquet on March 6, 2026, in Santa Clara, California. The Silicon Valley Engineering Council (SVEC) has selected them for induction into the 2026 cohort. This recognition highlights their significant contributions to the field. The event will take place amidst industry professionals and peers with a shared passion for engineering excellence.
Middlesex Water Co. will announce 2025 earnings on Feb 19, 0000.

data.title: Skyline Builders Group Holding Ltd. closes $31.59M private placement; issues 6,322 Preferred Shares, mainly to accredited investors.
data.description: Hong Kong, Feb. 13, 2026 - Skyline Builders Group Holding Limited (NASDAQ: SKBL), a civil engineering services provider in Hong Kong, completed its concurrent private placements of Series B Preferred Shares on February 13, 2026. The company issued 6,322 Preferred Shares with a par value of $0.00001 each, generating total gross proceeds of around $31.59 million. This amount excludes placement agent fees and other offering expenses. Of the total, approximately $26.59 million worth of Preferred Shares were sold to accredited investors under a Regulation D offering, while roughly $5 million worth went to non-US investors outside the United States under a Regulation S offering.

data.title: CPA Mike Morones explains differences between LLC and S Corp in New Mexico. Helpful guide for business owners.
data.description: In Silver City, New Mexico, on February 13, 2026, a publication explored the distinctions between an LLC and an S corp, aiding local business owners in making informed decisions about the appropriate structure for their companies. The article highlighted insights from Mike Morones from Mike Morones & Associates, LLC in Silver City. The discussion aimed to clarify the choice between the two entities, helping entrepreneurs navigate the complexities of business management.

data.title: Magna International and Atmus Filtration stocks surged after strong earnings in tough car market, due to easing tariff issues.
data.description: Shares of Magna International and Atmus Filtration experienced significant increases after surpassing earnings expectations, even amidst a difficult automotive market. The positive performance is attributed to the diminishing impacts of tariffs on these auto parts suppliers.

data.title: EquipmentShare.com, largest IPO of 2026, nearing buy point after two weeks. Leading in market cap growth.
data.description: EquipmentShare.com, a recently public company, has quickly become the biggest IPO of 2026 in terms of market capitalization. Within just two weeks of going public, the company has shown significant growth and is nearing a buy point for investors. This development positions EquipmentShare.com as a noteworthy player in the market, indicating promising potential for investors.

data.title: Stock market closed on Presidents Day. President Trump's holiday plans and market break highlighted.
data.description: The stock market will be closed on Monday for Presidents Day. President Trump is scheduled to spend the weekend before the holiday break. This information was shared in a post by Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: VERSES AI Inc. to host webinar for investors on Feb. 13, 2026. (CBOE: VERS) (OTCQB: VRSSF) cognitive computing company.
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia on February 13, 2026, VERSES AI Inc. (CBOE: VERS) (OTCQB: VRSSF) unveiled plans for a corporate update webinar aimed at investors. The company, known for its advanced cognitive computing solutions, including cutting-edge agentic software systems, is set to provide crucial insights during the upcoming webinar. This news signifies VERSES' commitment to keeping shareholders informed about its progress and future direction.

data.title: KBRA assigns preliminary ratings to $551.0 million RMBS transaction RCKT Mortgage Trust 2026-CES2.
data.description: In New York, KBRA has assigned preliminary ratings to 21 classes of mortgage-backed notes from RCKT Mortgage Trust 2026-CES2 (RCKT 2026-CES2). This transaction is valued at $551.0 million and sponsored by Woodward Capital Management LLC, an affiliate of Rocket Mortgage, LLC, and Loan Funding Structure VI LLC. RCKT 2026-CES2 comprises newly originated closed-end second lien mortgages entirely (100.0%). This rating is significant for investors and stakeholders involved in the RMBS market.

data.title: Granite REIT ($GRT.UN) declares distribution of CDN $0.2958 per unit for Feb 2026; to be paid on March 16.
data.description: Granite Real Estate Investment Trust (TSX: GRT.UN) based in Toronto declared a distribution of CDN $0.2958 per unit for February 2026. The payment is scheduled for March 16, 2026, to unitholders recorded by February 27, 2026. It is clarified that none of the distribution is considered connected income for U.S. federal tax purposes.

data.title: Canaccord Genuity Group Inc. reports Q3 fiscal 2026 results: Revenue $616.1M, net income $56.8M, EPS $0.36, 36.5% YoY revenue growth.
data.description: Canaccord Genuity Group Inc. reported its financial results for the third fiscal quarter and nine-month period ending December 31, 2025. The company saw a strong performance in its global capital markets and wealth management operations. Third quarter revenue was $616.1 million, a 36.5% increase year-over-year, with net income before taxes of $80.5 million, up 102.5% compared to the previous year. Global wealth management operations earned record quarterly revenue of $304.3 million, with total client assets reaching $144.8 billion. The UK & Crown Dependencies saw revenue of $130.4 million in the third quarter. The company also addressed media speculation regarding its UK wealth management business, stating uncertainties about any potential transactions and valuations. Additionally, investments in acquisitions contributed to revenue growth. Canaccord Genuity Capital Markets reported revenue of $300.8 million, a 42.8% increase from the previous year, with improvements in investment banking revenue. The company announced dividends of $0.085 per share in the third quarter. Overall, the company showed positive financial growth and strategic investments in various markets.

data.title: Eversource Energy reports full-year 2025 earnings of $1.69 billion ($4.56 per share) compared to $811.7 million in 2024.
data.description: Eversource Energy, a company listed on NYSE as ES, released its full-year and fourth quarter 2025 financial results on February 12, 2026. The report includes a "CONSOLIDATED STATEMENTS OF INCOME/(LOSS)" table. In 2025, Eversource Energy reported earnings of $1.69 billion, or $4.56 per share, showing significant growth from the $811.7 million, or $2.27 per share, earned in 2024. Non-GAAP recurring earnings for the year totaled $1.77 billion, equivalent to $4.76 per share.

data.title: Granite Ridge Resources announces $0.11 quarterly dividend per share, payable on March 13, 2026, to shareholders as of February 27, 2026.
data.description: In Dallas, Granite Ridge Resources, Inc. (NYSE: GRNT) revealed a quarterly dividend of $0.11 per share, set to be distributed on March 13, 2026, to shareholders as of February 27, 2026. The declaration of future dividends is contingent on Board of Directors' approval. The company will disclose its financial outcomes from the fourth quarter of 2025 during an earnings conference call.

data.title: Proxy advisory firms recommend shareholders vote for Criteo S.A.'s redomiciliation to Luxembourg from France - Glass Lewis & Co., LLC and Institutional Shareholder Services, Inc. support the move.
data.description: In New York on February 13, 2026, Criteo S.A. (NASDAQ: CRTO) disclosed that two prominent independent proxy advisory firms, Glass Lewis & Co., LLC and Institutional Shareholder Services, Inc., have made announcements. Criteo is a global platform that facilitates connections within the commerce ecosystem.

data.title: Harley-Davidson, Inc. (NYSE: HOG) declares $0.1875 dividend per share for Q1 2026, payable on March 17.
data.description: Harley-Davidson, Inc. (NYSE: HOG) headquartered in Milwaukee has announced a cash dividend of $0.1875 per share for Q1 of 2026, approved by its Board of Directors. This dividend will be paid out on March 17, 2026, to shareholders holding the Company's common stock as of March.

data.title: Trinity Biotech (Nasdaq: TRIB) told to meet Nasdaq rule of $1 min bid price for 30 days to stay listed.
data.description: On February 13, 2026, Trinity Biotech plc (Nasdaq: TRIB), a biotechnology company specializing in human diagnostics and diabetes management, was informed by the Nasdaq Stock Market LLC that they are not meeting the minimum bid price requirement of $1.00 per share for their American Depositary Shares (ADSs) as per Nasdaq Listing Rule 5450(a)(1). This notice, issued on February 11, 2026, states that the Company's ADSs have not closed at or above $1.00 for the past 30 consecutive business days. Trinity Biotech plc focuses on developing wearable biosensors and other solutions in the medical field.

data.title: South Bow Corp. shares RCA findings of Keystone Pipeline incident at MP-171 in North Dakota in April 2025.
data.description: In Calgary, Alberta on February 13, 2026, South Bow Corp. (TSX & NYSE: SOBO) in collaboration with the Pipeline and Hazardous Materials Safety Administration (PHMSA) revealed the findings of the independent third-party root cause analysis (RCA) regarding the occurrence at Milepost 171 (MP-171) of the Keystone Pipeline on April 8, 2025, close to Fort Ransom, North Dakota.
